changes.value:
## What

The `[data-focused]::before` target bar currently overlaps field content. It needs to sit to the left of the field icon/label, not inside the content area.

Adjust the CSS in `index.css` so the bar is positioned outside the icon column in the inspector layout.

### Files to modify
- `kanban-app/ui/src/index.css`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Focus bar visually appears to the left of the field icon
- [ ] No content overlap or clipping"
Focus bar position — move left of field icon
